name: 16p11_2_NPIPB_SD
description: NPIPB nuclear pore complex interacting protein B family — multi-copy human-specific duplicon family distributed across chr16p11.2 BP4-BP5 and beyond. NPIPB1-B15 paralogs at >99% identity drive most of the BP4/BP5 SD content alongside BOLA2; key contributor to 16p11.2 CNV recurrence.

architecture.internal_structure: NPIPB1-B15 plus NPIPA family copies distributed throughout 16p; each duplicon ~10-15 kb at >99% identity; copy number variable 12-30 across populations.
